title: S1: an honest coverage gate — content-addressed pins, asserted counts, unparsed-line reporting, shallow-clone fallback
action: Per F8 (supersedes F1) and reports/advisor-digest-f2.md, which MEASURED the defect: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs's inventorySpec is format-blind — docs/specs/onboarding.md has 22 rules written '- **R1** — ...' that inventory as R0, its behaviors are unnumbered so B0, and decision-memory + worktree-parallelism yield 0 anchors entirely. Rewrite the gate's ground truth so it cannot lie. (1) PIN REGISTRY: replace the hand-authored ANCHOR_REGISTRY anchor lists with per-area pins {commit, path, blob_sha, scheme, expected_counts}. ALL FOUR asserted at check time: resolve the blob, verify its sha, extract with the area's declared scheme, and compare against expected_counts. A count MISMATCH is a loud typed failure — not only an empty set. An area with no declared scheme is REFUSED, never passed 0/0. (2) SHALLOW-CLONE FALLBACK: `git show <sha>:<path>` fails outright in a --depth 1 clone. Commit each pinned source verbatim under docs/history/okf-migration-f2/sources/<area>.md and, when git cannot resolve the blob, verify that copy with `git hash-object` against blob_sha and use it. A missing BOTH is exit 1, never a skip. (3) UNPARSED-LINE REPORTING: the inventory must report how many non-blank body lines it did not classify, per section. This is the visibility that makes format-blindness detectable; onboarding MUST report a large unparsed count — a clean parse there proves the extractor is still blind and the cell has not done its job. (4) SCHEME awareness: nine-section B*/R*/E*/P* and flat PAT* are the two schemes that exist today; the shape is declared per area in the pin, and the extractor dispatches on it. Do NOT invent a scheme for the shapeless areas in this cell — that is F9/S5 work; just make the gate REFUSE them clearly. (5) Retrofit the two shipped areas to the new pin form: advisor-protocol (pin the commit before a0ea0cc turned it into a stub) must still derive 26 (4 B, 9 R, 6 E, 7 P), critical-patterns (before b0d495d) must still derive 47 — from the DERIVED path, with expected_counts asserted. Keep the PASS/FAIL output wording the chain entries depend on. RED-FIRST: write the tests first and capture the red run — derived counts match shipped; wrong sha exits 1; right sha + wrong expected_counts exits 1; empty extraction exits 1 (never 0/0 green); missing blob WITH the committed copy present falls back and passes; missing both exits 1; onboarding's inventory reports a non-zero unparsed count.

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 (65 suites) — both existing gates still PASS from the DERIVED path
red evidence: the new tests failed before implementation (verbatim)
derived counts quoted in the trace with the shas used: advisor-protocol 26 (4/9/6/7), critical-patterns 47
a deliberate wrong-sha run and a deliberate wrong-expected_counts run BOTH exit 1 — outputs quoted
an empty extraction exits 1 and never reports 0/0 as a pass — output quoted
onboarding.md's inventory reports a NON-ZERO unparsed-line count (quote it) — this is the proof the extractor is no longer blind
the fallback path is exercised: an unresolvable sha with the committed source copy present still verifies via git hash-object — output quoted
ANCHOR_REGISTRY's hand-authored anchor lists are gone; only the pin map remains
prohibitions: never let an empty, failed, or unscheme'd extraction read as a pass — the exact hole this cell closes
do not invent an anchor scheme for decision-memory or worktree-parallelism here (F9/S5 owns that) — refuse them clearly instead
do not change the PASS/FAIL wording the chain entries depend on
do not touch docs/knowledge/ concept content — gate machinery and committed source copies only
no new runtime dependency; git via child_process as scripts/ already does

trace.outcome: Coverage gate rebuilt on content-addressed pins: sha/scheme/count all asserted, empty+mismatched+unresolvable+unscheme'd extractions all exit 1, shallow-clone fallback via committed verbatim sources, unparsed-block reporting makes format-blindness visible (onboarding 48 blocks / 507 lines vs pinned advisor-protocol 0). Both shipped gates still derive 26 and 47. Chain green, 66 suites.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check advisor-protocol and --check-patterns (the two shipped chain gates whose ground truth this cell replaces)",
    "scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs (floor count + MANDATORY_SUITES pinning, the mechanism that keeps a new suite in the chain)",
    "docs/knowledge/patterns/20260722-a-coverage-gate-derives-ground-truth-it-never-compares-two-hand-lists.md (the promoted pattern this cell implements)"
  ],
  "tests_added": [
    "scripts/test_okf_pins.mjs — 83 assertions, new chain suite (auto-discovered under scripts/, pinned in MANDATORY_SUITES, floor bumped 50 -> 51). Covers: the hand-authored ANCHOR_REGISTRY / PATTERNS_ANCHOR_REGISTRY constants are gone from the code; every pin declares commit/path/blob_sha/scheme/expected_counts/source_copy and asserts a total; advisor-protocol derives exactly 26 (4 B / 9 R / 6 E / 7 P) and critical-patterns exactly 47 from the DERIVED path; the committed verbatim source copies exist and hash to blob_sha; a wrong blob_sha is refused (PIN_SHA_MISMATCH, exit 1) both in-process and via the CLI; a right sha with wrong expected_counts is refused (PIN_COUNT_MISMATCH, exit 1) — a mismatch, not merely an empty set; an empty extraction is refused (PIN_EMPTY_EXTRACTION, exit 1) EVEN when the pin honestly declares total 0, so 0/0 can never read as green; an unresolvable commit with the committed copy present falls back and passes with via=committed-copy; an unresolvable commit with no copy is PIN_UNRESOLVED exit 1; a drifted copy is PIN_SHA_MISMATCH; decision-memory and worktree-parallelism are refused by name with PIN_NO_SCHEME (never passed 0/0) and `--check decision-memory` exits 1; an unknown area is PIN_UNKNOWN_AREA; an invented scheme name is PIN_UNKNOWN_SCHEME; docs/specs/onboarding.md reports a NON-ZERO unparsed-block count attributed per section; both shipped gates keep their exact PASS wording."
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before implementation the new suite could not get past its API probe:
  FAIL test_okf_pins: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs must export PIN_REGISTRY
  FAIL test_okf_pins: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs must export derivePin
  FAIL test_okf_pins: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs must export derivePinForArea
  FAIL test_okf_pins: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs must export extractByScheme
  FAIL test_okf_pins: scripts/okf_migrate.mjs must export resolvePinnedSource
  FAIL test_okf_pins: the derived-pin API is missing — nothing further can be asserted
  EXIT: 1",
  "verification_run": "Full chain `node scripts/run_verify.mjs` GREEN: 'PASS run_verify: 66 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=58715ms' (65 before + scripts/test_okf_pins.mjs). Within it: PASS scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check advisor-protocol, PASS scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --check-patterns, PASS scripts/test_okf_pins.mjs (83 assertions), PASS scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs.

DERIVED counts with shas (node scripts/okf_migrate.mjs --verify-pins):
  PASS advisor-protocol: 26 anchors {behaviors:4,rules:9,edges:6,pointers:7,total:26,unparsed_blocks:0} from blob f3f123173726517c6a5068fd07d2b6c048a94043 (commit 19c0e50d = a0ea0cc^) via git, scheme ba-nine-section
  PASS critical-patterns: 47 anchors {patterns:47,total:47,unparsed_blocks:0} from blob 2bf112090761cb8d1b2fbc63c897b525ac0f3b9f (commit a0ea0cc4 = b0d495d^) via git, scheme flat-pattern-list
  SKIP-REFUSED decision-memory / worktree-parallelism: no anchor scheme declared (F9/S5)

NEGATIVE PATHS, all exit 1, quoted verbatim:
  WRONG SHA: 'PIN_SHA_MISMATCH: 19c0e50d:docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md resolves to blob f3f123173726517c6a5068fd07d2b6c048a94043, but the pin declares 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 — the pin and the history disagree about what the pinned source IS' exit=1
  WRONG EXPECTED_COUNTS (right sha): 'PIN_COUNT_MISMATCH: expected_counts.rules = 8, but the pinned blob (git) derives 9' + 'expected_counts.total = 25, but the pinned blob (git) derives 26' exit=1
  EMPTY EXTRACTION (pin declares total 0): 'PIN_EMPTY_EXTRACTION: scheme "ba-nine-section" extracted ZERO anchors from the pinned source (committed-copy). An empty extraction never reads as a pass' exit=1 — 0/0 is never green
  MISSING BOTH: 'PIN_UNRESOLVED: neither git nor a committed copy can produce the pinned source: 00000000:docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md is unresolvable and .bee/tmp/f2-1b/absent.md does not exist. This is exit 1, never a skip' exit=1
  UNSCHEME'D: '--check decision-memory' -> 'PIN_NO_SCHEME: "decision-memory" declares no anchor scheme, so it is REFUSED rather than passed 0/0' then 'FAIL okf_migrate --check decision-memory: ground truth could not be derived — refusing to report coverage' exit=1

FALLBACK PROOF (shallow clone): pin with an unresolvable commit (40 zeros) + correct blob_sha + the committed copy present -> 'PASS okf_migrate --derive docs/specs/advisor-protocol.md: 26 anchors from blob f3f123173726517c6a5068fd07d2b6c048a94043 via committed-copy' exit=0, and the derived counts are identical to the git path. `git hash-object` on both committed copies returns exactly the pinned blob ids (f3f1231… / 2bf1120…).

UNPARSED-LINE PROOF (the single most important number — the extractor is no longer blind): `--inventory docs/specs/onboarding.md` reports counts {behaviors:0,rules:0,edges:15,pointers:15,total:30} with unparsed blocks {behaviors:20,rules:28,edges:0,pointers:0,total:48} and unparsed lines {behaviors:210,rules:209,edges:46,pointers:42,total:507}. Samples name the exact blind spots: 'behaviors L96: **Detect (every run).** …', 'behaviors L103: **Vendor (apply run, opted-in projects only).** …'. CONTRAST: the pinned advisor-protocol blob reports counts {4,9,6,7,total:26} with unparsed blocks {0,0,0,0,total:0} — so the non-zero count is a real signal about onboarding's format, not noise from the metric.",
  "notes": "Classification regexes were deliberately left byte-identical to okf-5's, so the two shipped areas derive their counts through the same rules that produced them — what is new is the pin assertion around the extraction and the unparsed report beside it. unparsed_blocks:0 is itself asserted in each pin's expected_counts, so a future extractor regression that silently reclassifies anchors as prose fails the gate even if the totals still add up. Fixing onboarding's format-blindness is explicitly NOT this cell (F9/S5) — this cell makes it visible and makes the gate refuse rather than lie."
}

26 {4,9,6,7} and 47 via DERIVED path; chain PASS lines byte-identical to fb3bba4^ modulo a variable rename; new line additive
PIN_REGISTRY :118-170 all five keys asserted; git hash-object on both committed copies matches declared blob_shas exactly
40-zero commit + copy present => PASS via committed-copy EXIT=0; copy missing => PIN_COPY_MISSING EXIT=1; both missing => PIN_UNRESOLVED EXIT=1
decision-memory and worktree-parallelism both PIN_NO_SCHEME EXIT=1; verify-pins reports SKIP-REFUSED, never counts them
classification regexes byte-identical to fb3bba4^; only accounting added. Restraint CORRECT: no blind area is gated today (unpinned/unschemed both exit 1), so the deferral cannot hide a false green
